title: gleichenia longipes
intro: Gleichenia longipes, also known as the long-footed scaly male fern, is a species of fern in the family Gleicheniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gleichenia longipes include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
